channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Alcohol consumption in Canada declines as younger generations adopt a sober lifestyle
item.description: Statistics Canada reports that alcohol sales in Canada have fallen for the fourth consecutive year, marking the largest annual drop in 20 years. Between March 2024 and March 2025, sales of alcoholic b...

item.title: India and New Zealand face off in T20 World Cup final
item.description: India are set to defend their T20 World Cup title as they take on New Zealand, who are chasing their first global white-ball trophy, in a final staged at the massive Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad...

item.title: Two Policemen Killed and Civilians Injured in Wana Market Bomb Explosion
item.description: In South Waziristan’s Rustam Bazaar, a bomb blast on Saturday tragically claimed the lives of two policemen while injuring four others, according to Deputy Superintendent of Police Asghar Ali Shah. Ei...

item.title: Dispute over Santhal event venue between President Murmu and West Bengal government intensifies
item.description: A political controversy has intensified in West Bengal following the last-minute change of venue for an event involving President Droupadi Murmu, who hails from the tribal community. Prime Minister Na...

item.title: Reflecting on the Soham Murders Following Ian Huntley's Death
item.description: The passing of Ian Huntley offers a moment to reflect on one of the most harrowing criminal cases in recent British history. In August 2002, Soham, a small Cambridgeshire village, became the centre of...

item.title: British and French Troops Conduct Military Exercises in Ukraine Amid Rising Tensions
item.description: Over 600 British and French paratroopers are currently training together in exercises simulating combat scenarios, ambushes, and defensive operations, preparing for potential involvement in Ukraine. T...

item.title: Union Agriculture Minister Proposes Coconut Oil Inclusion in PDS to Benefit Farmers and Consumers
item.description: On Saturday, Union Agriculture Minister Shivraj Singh Chouhan stated that the Coconut Development Board has formally requested state governments to include coconut oil in the Public Distribution Syste...

item.title: Karachi Universities Shift Morning Classes Online Amid Fuel Price Hike
item.description: Due to the sharp rise in petrol and diesel prices following the ongoing conflict in the Middle East, major universities in Karachi have decided to move their morning classes online. The University of ...

item.title: DCI Implements Leadership Reshuffle, Daniel Kandie Becomes Nairobi RCIO
item.description: The Directorate of Criminal Investigations (DCI) has carried out a major leadership reshuffle aimed at improving operational efficiency across Kenya. DCI Director Mohamed Amin announced the appointmen...

item.title: Abuja Court Grants Bail To Ozekhome And Useni’s Son Over UK Property Fraud Allegations
item.description: Abuja High Court don grant Senior Advocate of Nigeria (SAN), Mike Ozekhome, and Ponfa Useni, son of Jeremiah Useni, wey dem dey call Tali Shani, bail of N10 million each. Dis na because dem dey face a...

item.title: Ethan Sanders boots golden point field goal as Raiders edge Sea Eagles 29-28 in NRL Round 1 thriller
item.description: In a captivating opening round clash of the 2026 NRL season at Brookvale Oval, the Canberra Raiders defeated the Manly Warringah Sea Eagles 29-28 in golden point extra time. Young Raiders halfback Eth...

item.title: EAM Comments on Iranian Ship Sinking and US Temporary Approval for Indian Russian Oil Purchases
item.description: In today's major news, External Affairs Minister S. Jaishankar addressed the recent sinking of an Iranian warship in the Indian Ocean. He clarified that one Iranian ship docked in Kochi with India's a...

item.title: KCB to Host Kabras Sugar in Kenya Cup Round 10 Match at Ruaraka
item.description: In the 2025/26 Kenya Cup season, Round 10 brings a massive showdown as KCB Rugby faces Kabras Sugar RFC at KCB Sports Club, known as the Lion’s Den, in Ruaraka on Saturday, March 7. This match is key ...

item.title: Allegations of ₦5 Million Payments for ACP Promotions in Nigeria Police Under Egbetokun
item.description: Documents wey SaharaReporters get show say some Nigerian Police senior officers allegedly pay about ₦5 million each to Police Service Commission (PSC) to secure promotion to Assistant Commissioner of ...

item.title: Anne Curtis condemns Bong Suntay’s misogynistic remarks during House proceedings
item.description: MANILA, Philippines – Anne Curtis has publicly responded to Quezon City 4th District Representative Bong Suntay’s recent lewd and misogynistic comments. Curtis emphasized that women regularly face suc...

item.title: Spiritual Significance and Rewards of the Last 20 Days of Ramadan
item.description: As Ramadan enters its final twenty days, Tanzanian Muslims, like believers worldwide, experience heightened spiritual reflection and devotion. By this stage, the body has grown accustomed to fasting, ...

item.title: Argentina enacts major labour law reforms aimed at modernizing the workforce
item.description: Argentina’s President Javier Milei has implemented a sweeping set of labour reforms designed to modernize the country’s workforce and improve economic performance. The new measures extend the maximum ...

item.title: Retired Bahria Town Official Sentenced to 10 Years for Money Laundering
item.description: ISLAMABAD: In a significant legal development, an additional sessions court has convicted retired Colonel Khalilur Rehman, the vice chief executive of Bahria Town, in a major money laundering case. Th...

item.title: California Residents Will Move Clocks Forward as Daylight Saving Time Begins
item.description: On Sunday, Californians will once again adjust their clocks forward by one hour for the start of daylight saving time at 2 a.m. Despite widespread public frustration, legislative efforts to eliminate ...

item.title: US Embassy Advises Americans in the Philippines to Exercise Caution Following Middle East Tensions
item.description: The United States Embassy in the Philippines has issued a safety advisory for Americans living in the country following recent military actions by the US and Israel against Iran. The advisory, release...
